# Globex

Globex is a diversified financial services firm subject to CSRD reporting obligations across twelve European entities. The engagement centers on double-materiality assessment, GRI-aligned data governance, and TCFD climate scenario analysis to meet the 2026 reporting deadline. Sofia Reinholt leads the regulatory affairs workstream while Marcus Webb owns data infrastructure and cross-entity consolidation.
